metadata.title: JEP Expressive Adequacy Scenario Corpus
metadata.author: Cognitive Emergence Lab
metadata.description: A 24-scenario exploratory corpus for testing coverage of Judgment, Delegation, Termination, and Verification primitives across human-agent and agent-agent decision chains.
metadata.coding_instructions: Each scenario is decomposed into key event points. Independent coders classify each event as J (Judgment), D (Delegation), T (Termination), V (Verification), or O (Other). Target: coverage > 90%, residual Other < 10%, intercoder agreement (Cohen's kappa) >= 0.75.

scenarios.description: A planning agent proposes a synthesis of sources and a recommended answer path. The human operator reviews the proposal, accepts part of it, and revises the final direction before execution.

events.description: Planning agent generates proposal with recommended answer path
Human operator reviews and revises the final direction
Compliance role checks that the record remains intact and correctly linked to prior chain

scenarios.description: A literature-review agent is delegated authority to search and summarize papers within a bounded scope. Later, the supervising researcher detects hallucinated citations and revokes the agent's authority.

events.description: Supervising researcher delegates search authority to agent within bounded scope
Agent executes search and produces summary (recorded as judgment)
Researcher detects hallucinated citations and revokes agent authority
Auditor confirms revocation record is intact and correctly chained

scenarios.description: A coding agent suggests an experimental protocol. The lab director overrides the protocol with a safer alternative before human subjects are involved.

events.description: Coding agent suggests experimental protocol
Lab director overrides with safer alternative
Institutional review board verifies both proposals were recorded and chained

scenarios.description: A data-analysis agent is granted access to a dataset under time-limited delegation. The access automatically terminates after 48 hours.

events.description: Principal investigator delegates dataset access to analysis agent for 48 hours
Agent performs statistical analysis and records findings
System automatically terminates access after 48-hour window expires
Data steward verifies access logs match delegation scope and termination timestamp

scenarios.description: Two research agents independently analyze the same raw data and produce conflicting conclusions. A human arbiter reviews both and selects one.

events.description: Agent A analyzes data and concludes Effect X is significant
Agent B analyzes same data and concludes Effect X is not significant
Human arbiter reviews both chains and selects Agent A's conclusion
Peer reviewer verifies both agent outputs and arbiter selection are recorded

scenarios.description: A grant-management agent detects that a subcontractor's deliverable is overdue. The agent escalates by terminating the subcontractor's active task and delegating to a backup.

events.description: Grant-management agent detects overdue deliverable
Agent terminates subcontractor's active task authority
Agent delegates remaining work to backup subcontractor
Program officer verifies chain of termination and reassignment

scenarios.description: A lead agent is granted authority to distribute subtasks to specialized retrieval, coding, and reporting agents within a bounded scope and validity window. Later, the supervising human detects drift or unsafe tool use and revokes that authority, restoring direct approval before any further delegation occurs.

events.description: Supervising human delegates authority to lead agent for subtask distribution
Lead agent delegates retrieval subtask to retrieval agent
Lead agent delegates coding subtask to coding agent
Supervising human detects unsafe tool use and revokes lead agent authority
Auditor confirms revocation record is intact and correctly chained before disputed downstream action

scenarios.description: A warehouse robot fleet uses a lead agent to coordinate picking tasks. One robot reports a damaged shelf. The lead agent terminates the picking task for that zone and reassigns robots to a safe zone.

events.description: Robot reports damaged shelf observation
Lead agent terminates picking task for damaged zone
Lead agent delegates new picking tasks to robots in safe zone
Warehouse supervisor verifies task termination and reassignment records

scenarios.description: A coding agent pair uses driver-navigator pattern. The navigator agent detects a security vulnerability in the driver's proposed code and terminates the current session.

events.description: Driver agent proposes code implementation
Navigator agent detects security vulnerability
Navigator agent terminates current coding session
Security auditor verifies vulnerability detection and session termination are recorded

scenarios.description: A medical diagnosis agent consults a specialist radiology agent for a second opinion. The radiology agent confirms the primary diagnosis.

events.description: Primary diagnosis agent issues initial diagnosis
Primary agent delegates radiology review to specialist agent
Radiology specialist confirms primary diagnosis
Hospital compliance officer verifies both diagnosis and confirmation are linked

scenarios.description: A content moderation agent chain flags a post for review. A senior moderator agent overrides the flag and restores the post. A trust-and-safety analyst later verifies the override was justified.

events.description: Moderation agent chain flags post for review
Senior moderator agent overrides flag and restores post
Trust-and-safety analyst verifies override justification and record chain

scenarios.description: A supply-chain optimization agent discovers a supplier has violated ethical standards. The agent terminates the supplier's active orders and delegates emergency sourcing to a backup agent.

events.description: Optimization agent discovers ethical violation
Agent terminates supplier's active orders
Agent delegates emergency sourcing to backup agent
Ethics committee verifies violation record, termination, and sourcing delegation

scenarios.description: A support agent recommends a refund to a customer. The human supervisor approves the refund up to a dollar limit. The agent processes the refund and records the judgment.

events.description: Support agent recommends refund to customer
Human supervisor approves refund within dollar limit
Agent processes refund
Finance team verifies refund record matches approval chain

scenarios.description: A tier-1 support agent delegates a technical issue to a tier-2 specialized agent. The tier-2 agent resolves the issue and terminates the ticket.

events.description: Tier-1 agent delegates technical issue to tier-2 agent
Tier-2 agent resolves issue
Tier-2 agent terminates support ticket
Quality assurance verifies ticket closure chain

scenarios.description: A customer support agent detects a potential fraud pattern and terminates the automated refund workflow, escalating to a human fraud analyst.

events.description: Support agent detects potential fraud pattern
Agent terminates automated refund workflow
Human fraud analyst reviews case and makes determination
Compliance auditor verifies fraud detection, termination, and analyst judgment are all recorded

scenarios.description: A chatbot agent is delegated authority to offer discounts up to 10%. The chatbot offers a 15% discount by mistake. The human supervisor terminates the chatbot's discount authority.

events.description: Business delegates discount authority to chatbot (max 10%)
Chatbot offers 15% discount (exceeds scope)
Human supervisor terminates chatbot discount authority
Internal audit verifies delegation scope, violation, and termination

scenarios.description: A procurement agent is delegated authority to purchase office supplies under $500. The agent selects a vendor and places an order. A procurement officer later verifies the order is within scope.

events.description: Procurement officer delegates purchasing authority to agent (under $500)
Agent selects vendor and places order
Procurement officer verifies order is within delegated scope and correctly recorded

scenarios.description: A procurement agent detects a price-fixing pattern among vendors and terminates the current bidding round, delegating to a new sourcing agent with refreshed vendor pool.

events.description: Procurement agent detects price-fixing pattern
Agent terminates current bidding round
Agent delegates to new sourcing agent with refreshed vendor pool
Legal counsel verifies price-fixing detection, termination, and reassignment records

scenarios.description: A vendor-evaluation agent recommends rejecting a bid due to non-compliance. The procurement director overrides the recommendation and accepts the bid with conditions.

events.description: Evaluation agent recommends rejecting bid due to non-compliance
Procurement director overrides and accepts bid with conditions
External auditor verifies both recommendation and override are recorded with reasoning

scenarios.description: An inventory agent automatically delegates restocking orders to a preferred supplier when stock falls below threshold. A human manager later terminates the automatic delegation after a quality issue.

events.description: System delegates automatic restocking authority to inventory agent
Inventory agent delegates restocking order to supplier when threshold triggered
Human manager terminates automatic delegation after quality issue
Quality manager verifies termination record and supplier switch chain

scenarios.description: An autonomous vehicle agent decides to change lanes. The human safety driver overrides the decision and takes manual control. The vehicle logs both the agent decision and the human override.

events.description: Autonomous vehicle agent decides to change lanes
Human safety driver overrides and takes manual control
Post-trip safety review verifies both agent decision and human override are recorded and timestamped

scenarios.description: A drone swarm leader agent delegates surveillance sectors to sub-drones. The ground operator detects an airspace conflict and terminates the swarm leader's delegation authority.

events.description: Ground operator delegates surveillance authority to swarm leader
Swarm leader delegates sectors to sub-drones
Ground operator detects airspace conflict and terminates swarm leader authority
Air traffic control verifies termination record and sector reassignment

scenarios.description: A manufacturing robot agent detects a tooling anomaly and terminates its own operation, delegating inspection to a maintenance agent. The maintenance agent verifies the anomaly and clears the robot for restart.

events.description: Robot agent detects tooling anomaly and terminates own operation
Robot agent delegates inspection to maintenance agent
Maintenance agent verifies anomaly and clears robot for restart
Plant safety officer verifies anomaly detection, termination, inspection, and clearance chain

scenarios.description: A trading agent is delegated authority to execute trades within risk parameters. The agent exceeds the daily loss limit. The risk manager terminates the agent's trading authority and delegates remaining positions to a liquidation agent.

events.description: Risk manager delegates trading authority within risk parameters
Trading agent exceeds daily loss limit
Risk manager terminates agent trading authority
Risk manager delegates remaining positions to liquidation agent
Regulatory auditor verifies limit breach, termination, and liquidation delegation
